name: @umari/js
description: TypeScript SDK for writing umari modules compiled to WASM

scripts.generate-types: jco types ../../wit/command --out-dir src/generated/command && jco types ../../wit/projector --out-dir src/generated/projector && jco types ../../wit/policy --out-dir src/generated/policy && jco types ../../wit/effect --out-dir src/generated/effect && jco types ../../wit/sqlite --world-name sqlite --out-dir src/generated/sqlite
